title: A Chicken's Revenge
description: The chickens are tired of being slaughtered, it's time to fight back. Introducing a Chicken's Revenge.
body:
# Welcome to a Chicken's Revenge!

A mod all about a chicken's revenge arc because they are tired of being slaughtered for food. They have come to take over the world with their King the Giant Killer Chicken. 

This mod adds three new mobs to the game.

_The Suspicious Chicken, Chicken Solider, and Giant Killer Chicken_

The Suspicious Chickens spawn naturally in the world and upon being killed, have a 50% chance of spawning the Giant Killer Chicken. But watch out some suspicious chickens will attack you on sight while others are passive. 

Suspicious chickens, well, look suspicious, they have different eye colors and combs to differentiate them from normal chickens. 

The Giant Killer Chicken has 375 hearts, does lots of damage and has multiple new attacks it does to kill and rid you of this world. 

This chicken will summon literal meteors from the sky to destroy you. It will turn the ground into a fiery mess. Summon minions to fight you. And summon evoker fangs from the ground to bite your legs. 

This mod also adds a new enchantment called Chicken Slayer, makes you deal more damage to chicken-type mobs. Only does this to chicken-type mobs added by this mod

**Please join the discord to report any issues or please go onto the CurseForge page and post a comment there about your issue.**

[Use my code Kadeee1 for 25% off when buying your first server from BisectHosting]( https://bisecthosting.com/Kadeee1)
